rationale: User-reported timeout when using ClusterConfigurator; internal connectivity bug, no specific spec rule named.

LINQ internal ExpressionComparer missing Pipeline case; internal LINQ expression handling bug.

LINQ aggregation generates wrong $min referencing loop variable instead of outer; internal LINQ translation bug.

Feature request: $convert aggregation not supported in LINQ; API ergonomics gap, no spec violation.

LINQ Where ignored inside GroupBy accumulator; internal LINQ expression evaluation bug.

LINQ $filter uses wrong variable reference ($$p.Meta instead of $Meta); internal LINQ variable scoping bug.
Improvement to add $comment to more operation types; proactive API ergonomics feature, not a spec violation.
